en.text: Whoever took his right or retaliation from somebody without submitting the case to the ruler

ar.text: باب مَنْ أَخَذَ حَقَّهُ أَوِ اقْتَصَّ دُونَ السُّلْطَانِ

حَدَّثَنَا مُسَدَّدٌ، حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى، عَنْ حُمَيْدٍ،، أَنَّ رَجُلاً، اطَّلَعَ فِي بَيْتِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَسَدَّدَ إِلَيْهِ مِشْقَصًا‏.‏ فَقُلْتُ مَنْ حَدَّثَكَ قَالَ أَنَسُ بْنُ مَالِكٍ‏.‏

al.text: Transmeton Enes bin Maliku: Një burrë shikoi fshehurazi brenda shtëpisë së Pejgamberit (s.a.v.s.), ndërsa Pejgamberi (s.a.v.s.) drejtoi një majë shigjete drejt tij për ta goditur.

en.text: Humaid said, "A man peeped into the house of the Prophet (ﷺ) and the Prophet (ﷺ) aimed an arrow head at him to hit him." I asked, "Who told you that?" He said, "Anas bin Malik" (See Hadith No. 258 and 259, Vol. 8)
